hooks.command: sh -c 'p="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do q="$d/.codex/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; [ -f "$q" ] && { p="$q"; break; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; fi; exec python3 "$p" session_start'

sh -c 'p="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do q="$d/.codex/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; [ -f "$q" ] && { p="$q"; break; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; fi; exec python3 "$p" user_prompt_submit'

sh -c 'p="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do q="$d/.codex/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; [ -f "$q" ] && { p="$q"; break; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; fi; exec python3 "$p" post_tool_use'

sh -c 'p="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$p" ]; then d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do q="$d/.codex/hooks/context-task-planning/scripts/run-hook.py"; [ -f "$q" ] && { p="$q"; break; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; fi; exec python3 "$p" stop'
